title: Dontostemon glandulosus
taxonomy: Dontostemon glandulosus is classified within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as mustard or cabbage family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family. The genus Dontostemon is further grouped within the tribe Thelypodieae, which is a subfamily of Brassicaceae. Within the genus Dontostemon, D. glandulosus is one of several species of plants that are native to specific regions of Asia. The classification of D. glandulosus reflects its unique botanical features and its position within the broader plant kingdom.
